name: pyflow-acdc

metadata.name: pyflow-acdc
metadata.summary: A python-based tool for the design and analysis of hybrid AC/DC grids

documentation:
# PyFlow ACDC
A python-based tool for the design and analysis of hybrid AC/DC grids


PyFlow ACDC is a program worked on by ADOreD Project 

This project has received funding from the European Union’s  Horizon Europe 
Research and Innovation programme under the Marie Skłodowska-Curie grant 
agreement No 101073554.

Important

This project is experimental and under active development. Issue reports and contributions are very welcome.

To run examples, download the folder to you repository including the csv folders.

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.generate_dataframe_code_from_dict
documentation:
Generate Python code to recreate a DataFrame from an input dictionary.

```
param data_dict

Dictionary with column names as keys and lists as values.

param var_name

The desired variable name for the DataFrame.

return

Python code to recreate the DataFrame.
```

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.generate_add_price_zone_code
documentation:
Generates Python code with a for loop to call `add_price_zone` for each set of arguments
in the list `price_zone_data`.

```
param price_zone_data

List of dictionaries with arguments for add_price_zone.

return

Python code as a string to call add_price_zone for each set of arguments.
```

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.generate_add_gen_code
documentation:
Generate Python code with a for loop to call `add_gen` for each generator in the list `gens`.

```
param gens

List of dictionaries, where each dictionary contains the arguments for add_gen.

return

Python code as a string to call add_gen for each generator.
```

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.generate_add_ren_source_zone_code
documentation:
Generate Python code with a for loop to call `add_RenSource_zone` for each renewable source zone in the list `ren_source_zones`.

```
param ren_source_zones

List of dictionaries, where each dictionary contains the arguments for add_RenSource_zone.

return

Python code as a string to call add_RenSource_zone for each renewable source zone.
```

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.generate_add_ren_source_code
documentation:
Generate Python code with a for loop to call `add_RenSource` for each renewable source in the list `ren_sources`.

```
param ren_sources

List of dictionaries, where each dictionary contains the arguments for add_RenSource.

return

Python code as a string to call add_RenSource for each renewable source.
```

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_exportfiles.save_grid_to_file
documentation:
Save the generated main code to a .py file.

```
param main_code

The code to save to the file.

param file_name

The name of the file where the code will be saved.
```

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.Line_AC.get_relevant_attributes
documentation: Method to return only the relevant attributes for the subclass.

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.Line_AC.remove
documentation: Method to handle line removal from the class-level attributes.

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.Price_Zone.link_mtdc_price_zone
documentation: Register an MTDC price_zone to be notified when this price_zone's price changes.

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.Price_Zone.link_price_zone
documentation: Link another price_zone to this price_zone

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.MTDCPrice_Zone.add_linked_price_zone
documentation: Add a price_zone to the linked price_zones list.

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.MTDCPrice_Zone.update_price
documentation: Update the price of the MTDC price_zone based on the linked price_zones and strategy.

methods.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Class.MTDCPrice_Zone.override_price
documentation: Allow for manual override if desired

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_OPF.Translate_pyf_OPF
documentation: Translation of element wise to internal numbering

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Elements.assign_nodeToPrice_Zone
documentation: Assign node to a new price_zone and remove it from its previous price_zone

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Elements.assign_ConvToPrice_Zone
documentation: Assign node to a new price_zone and remove it from its previous price_zone

variables.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_Elements.module_name
documentation: Get the file name without extension

functions.name: pyflow_acdc.PyFlow_ACDC_TS.reset_to_initialize
documentation:
Resets all variables in the Pyomo model to their original initialize values.
model: Pyomo ConcreteModel
    The Pyomo model whose variables are to be reset.
initial_values: dict
    A dictionary containing the original initialize values of variables.
